summary: Local-first multi-agent AI runtime — solver-first routing, MAGMA audit architecture, autonomous Dream Mode learning. 75 agents, zero cloud.

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.

title: KassieIII/rag-docs
summary: Ask-your-docs RAG service: ingest Markdown/HTML/PDF, retrieve with pgvector HNSW, answer with a local Ollama LLM. Every claim cited as [chunk:N]. FastAPI + SQLAlchemy async + bge-small embeddings, with a 25-question eval harness.

title: adrianwedd/spark
summary: SPARK — a Claude-powered robot companion for a neurodivergent kid. Built on SunFounder PiCar-X + Raspberry Pi.

title: mezmo/aura
summary: A production-ready framework for composing AI agents from declarative TOML configuration, with MCP tool integration, RAG pipelines, and an OpenAI-compatible web API.

title: niclaslindstedt/zag
summary: Agents change weekly. Your workflows shouldn't. One CLI for Claude, Codex, Gemini, Copilot, and Ollama.

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: Local Deep Research achieves ~95% on SimpleQA benchmark (tested with GPT-4.1-mini). Supports local and cloud LLMs (Ollama, Google, Anthropic, ...). Searches 10+ sources - arXiv, PubMed, web, and your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: Arthurfert/LocalMind
summary: A graphic interface to interact with local LLMs.

title: claudenstein/sciknow
summary: Local-first scientific knowledge system. Ingest papers, build a compiled knowledge wiki, write grounded scientific books — all on your own hardware. No cloud APIs.

title: Celestialchris/SoulPrint-Canonical
summary: Local-first AI conversation archive. Import ChatGPT, Claude, Claude Code, Gemini, and Grok. Browse, search, ask, distill, export.

title: gfargo/coco
summary: AI-powered Git Assistant for CLI

title: dhruvin3001/cerebral
summary: A self-improving memory layer for AI coding agents — learns from corrections and discoveries autonomously, across sessions

title: pipeshub-ai/pipeshub-ai
summary: PipesHub is a fully extensible and explainable workplace AI platform for enterprise search and workflow automation

title: dakshp26/llamagraph
summary: Open Source Visual drag-and-drop AI pipeline builder powered by local Ollama LLMs — no cloud, no code, no limits.

title: googlarz/stapler

title: bradleybond512/crystal-ball
